blended.narrative: White Pass is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,581 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 55.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 44" over the past week. Current depth: 92".
